sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Southern Company beats revenue expectations, stock rises despite earnings miss
feed.summary: Southern Company reported fourth-quarter 2025 adjusted earnings of $0.55 per share, missing analyst expectations, but revenue surged to $7.0 billion, exceeding estimates. The company's shares rose 2.47% in pre-market trading, driven by the strong revenue performance and a positive 2026 outlook. For the full year 2025, adjusted earnings reached $4.30 per share with annual revenue climbing to $29.6 billion.

feed.title: Understanding Momentum Shifts in (IWMW)
feed.summary: This article analyzes the momentum shifts for Ishares Russell 2000 Buywrite Etf (IWMW), providing key findings and trading strategies from Stock Traders Daily's AI models. It notes a neutral near and mid-term outlook with a potential long-term positive bias, along with specific entry, target, and stop-loss levels for different risk profiles. The analysis highlights a favorable risk-reward setup and outlines multi-timeframe signal analysis.

feed.title: IDEXX Stock Has Rallied 40% Over the Past Year: Can a New CEO Keep the Momentum Going?
feed.summary: IDEXX Laboratories recently announced Michael Erickson will succeed Jay Mazelsky as CEO, following a year where shares surged significantly. Despite beating Q4 revenue estimates, concerns arose from a guided 2% decline in U.S. same-store clinical visits, causing a slight stock dip. Analysts project a potential 38% upside to $873 by December 2028, contingent on sustained 9% revenue growth and 33% operating margins, though the exit multiple already aligns with current market pricing.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRSK) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics (NASDAQ: VRSK) reported solid financial results for Q4 and full-year 2025, with organic constant currency revenue growth of 6.6% and adjusted EBITDA growth of 8.5% for the year, attributing success to strong subscription revenues and strategic focus on the global insurance industry. The company discussed its ongoing adoption of AI technologies, integration into products like ExactGen, and announced a $1.5 billion accelerated share repurchase program and an 11% dividend increase. Verisk provided its 2026 outlook, anticipating consolidated revenue between $3.19 billion and $3.24 billion, and adjusted EBITDA between $1.79 billion and $1.83 billion, with a focus on continued investment in innovation and client engagement.

feed.title: Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Moody's Corporation (NYSE: MCO) reported a record 2025, with total revenue exceeding $7.7 billion, up 9% year-over-year in both ratings and analytics, and an adjusted operating margin of 51.1%. The company's adjusted diluted EPS reached a record $14.94, a 20% increase year-over-year. Moody's is well-positioned for 2026, with strong growth in private credit, AI-related sales, and strategically optimizing its portfolio through divestitures and focused investments in high-demand areas, anticipating high single-digit revenue growth and expanding adjusted operating margins.

feed.title: OPENLANE, Inc. (NYSE:KAR) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: OPENLANE, Inc. (NYSE:KAR) announced strong Q4 2025 and full-year results, exceeding expectations with 9% consolidated growth and $76 million in adjusted EBITDA for Q4. The company's U.S. dealer-to-dealer business saw over 20% growth in Q4, and the finance segment also performed well. OPENLANE anticipates continued growth in 2026, particularly from its U.S. marketplace and recovering commercial segment, with an adjusted EBITDA forecast of $350 million to $370 million.

feed.title: Charles River Laboratories International, Inc. (NYSE:CRL) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories International (NYSE:CRL) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, with Q4 EPS missing expectations at -$5.62 against an anticipated $2.33. CEO James C. Foster announced his retirement in May, with Birgit H. Gershick appointed as the new CEO. The company provided 2026 guidance, expecting organic revenue to range from down 1% to flat, driven by improved DSA demand, strategic acquisitions, and cost-saving initiatives, despite some headwinds in RMS and Manufacturing.

feed.title: Uncrustables Is ‘Finally’ Launching a New Flavor Fans Can’t Wait to Try: ‘Huge News’
feed.summary: Uncrustables is set to release a new "Burstin' Blueberry" peanut butter sandwich flavor this spring, a move that has generated significant excitement among fans. The J.M. Smucker Company also announced that all Uncrustables sandwiches will now be able to be kept fresh in the fridge for up to five days, enhancing convenience for consumers. This new flavor expands their offerings and caters to a strong fan base, particularly among households with kids and Millennials.

feed.title: Ferroglobe PLC (NASDAQ:GSM) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Ferroglobe PLC (NASDAQ:GSM) reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, highlighting significant strategic progress despite external challenges like muted demand and predatory imports. The company achieved important trade measures in both the European Union and the United States, including safeguards and anti-dumping duties, which are expected to strengthen market conditions in 2026. Ferroglobe projects revenues to increase by 20% at the midpoint in 2026, driven by strong volume growth in silicon-based and manganese-based alloys, and continues its shareholder-friendly capital allocation strategy with increased dividends and share repurchases.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE:FE) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE) held its Q4 2025 earnings call, reporting strong financial results with core earnings of $2.55 per share, up 7.6% from 2024. The company announced a $36 billion five-year capital investment program to improve reliability and grid resiliency, targeting a 6% to 8% compounded annual EPS growth rate. Key topics included significant transmission investments, a proposed 1.2 GW natural gas facility in West Virginia, and strategies to maintain customer affordability while addressing evolving regulatory landscapes and demand for data centers.

feed.title: Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ:JACK) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ:JACK) reported its Q1 2026 earnings, missing expectations with an EPS of $1 against an anticipated $1.1. The company's CEO, Lance Tucker, highlighted efforts to simplify the business and reduce debt following the sale of Del Taco, while outlining "Jack on Track" and "Jack's Way" initiatives focused on operational improvements and guest experience. Despite a challenging quarter with a 6.7% decrease in same-store sales, the company expects steady improvement throughout 2026, driven by marketing activations and strategic long-term goals.

feed.title: Pre-market volume spike 19 Feb 2026: BKL.TO Invesco Senior Loan ETF (TSX) watch
feed.summary: The Invesco Senior Loan ETF CAD Hedged (BKL.TO) experienced a significant pre-market volume spike on February 19, 2026, trading at C$19.32 with 40,327 shares, nearly 37 times its average volume. This activity is attributed to intra-day flows into loan-linked ETFs, with Meyka AI rating BKL.TO a C+ (HOLD) and projecting a 36.14% upside to C$26.30 within one year. Traders are advised to use limit orders due to the ETF's thin average liquidity despite the volume surge.

feed.title: Amazon dethrones Walmart as the world’s biggest company by sales
feed.summary: Amazon has surpassed Walmart to become the world's largest company by revenue, reporting $717 billion in 2025 sales compared to Walmart's $713.2 billion for the 12 months ending January 31. This milestone is largely attributed to Amazon's rapidly growing cloud-computing business, Amazon Web Services (AWS), which contributed significantly to its revenue. While Amazon dominates online retail and Walmart leads in physical stores, analysts note that Amazon's "victory" is primarily due to success in a sector Walmart doesn't compete in.

feed.title: Here Are Thursday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Analog Devices, Chewy, Credo Technology, eBay, Fiverr, Shopify, Verizon, and More
feed.summary: This article summarizes top Wall Street analyst research calls for February 19, 2026, including upgrades, downgrades, and initiations for various companies like Analog Devices, Chewy, eBay, Fiverr, Shopify, and Verizon. It also provides a market overview, noting the conclusion of the fourth-quarter earnings season, current financial market trends for futures, bonds, oil, gold, and cryptocurrency, and the implication of Fed meeting minutes on future interest rate cuts.

feed.title: Caesars Entertainment Introduces First In-House Slot Game Ca$hline
feed.summary: Caesars Entertainment has launched its first in-house online slot game, Ca$hline, a three-reel stepper slot developed by Empire Creative. This game is the initial offering in a series designed to create exclusive player experiences and is currently available on Caesars Palace Online Casino, Horseshoe Online Casino, and Caesars Sportsbook & Casino in New Jersey. Ca$hline features a "Land It, Win It" format, a 2x Multiplier, Reverse Spins, and a Wheel Bonus to attract both casual players and slot enthusiasts.

feed.title: Jack in the Box urges shareholders to vote for board nominees
feed.summary: Jack in the Box Inc. is urging shareholders to vote for all 10 of its director nominees at the upcoming annual meeting on February 27, 2026. The company highlights the recommendation from proxy advisory firm Institutional Shareholder Services in support of its nominees. This comes as Biglari Capital Corp. and Sardar Biglari have launched a "vote no" campaign against Independent Board Chair David Goebel after Biglari was denied a board seat.

feed.title: Zacks Research Has Pessimistic View of Clorox Q3 Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q3 2026 earnings per share estimates for Clorox (NYSE:CLX) to $1.48, down from $1.55, maintaining a "Hold" rating on the stock. Other analysts have also adjusted price targets and ratings, resulting in an average "Reduce" rating and a consensus target price of $118.73 for Clorox. The company recently missed Q4 earnings estimates with $1.39 EPS but exceeded revenue expectations at $1.67 billion.

feed.title: Peeling Back the Apple: Shareholder Activists Seek to Expose Company's China Entanglements
feed.summary: Ahead of Apple, Inc.'s annual shareholder meeting, the National Center for Public Policy Research’s Free Enterprise Project (FEP) is urging investors to support a "China Entanglement Audit." FEP Executive Director Steve Milloy highlights the "existential corporate and national security risk" posed by Apple's deep ties to China, particularly concerning potential geopolitical conflicts and supply chain vulnerabilities. The proposed audit seeks transparency on financial exposure under high tariffs, risks from regulatory actions, intellectual property theft, and the costs of diversifying supply chains away from China.

feed.title: New Boeing 777-9 pilot simulators cleared for lifelike training
feed.summary: Boeing has received initial qualification certificates from the U.S. Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) and the European Union Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) for its 777-9 training devices. Located at the Boeing Training Campus in Gatwick and developed in collaboration with CAE, these simulators will replicate the aircraft's advanced systems to provide realistic training and prepare pilots for the operational readiness of the new 777-9. These qualifications are a crucial step towards validating training courseware before customer pilot training can commence.

feed.title: Weave Announces Strategic CareCredit Integration Partnership with Patient Financing Leader Synchrony®
feed.summary: Weave (NYSE: WEAV) has partnered with Synchrony (NYSE: SYF) to integrate its CareCredit patient financing solution into Weave's platform. This integration aims to streamline operations for healthcare practices and make patient financing more accessible and transparent. It will allow staff to view CareCredit status directly within Weave, helping patients more easily opt into necessary treatments.

feed.title: Peering Into S&P Global Inc's Recent Short Interest
feed.summary: S&P Global Inc.'s (NYSE: SPGI) short interest has decreased by 24.82% since its last report, now standing at 3.12 million shares, or 1.03% of available shares. This decline suggests a more bullish sentiment among investors towards the company. Compared to its peers, S&P Global Inc. has less short interest, with a peer group average of 6.12%.

feed.title: Merck Discloses Positive Data For Respiratory Syncytial Virus Antibody Treatment, Seeks FDA Nod For Broader Child Use
feed.summary: Merck & Co. has announced positive second RSV season data from its Phase 3 SMART trial for its antibody treatment, Enflonsia, which will be submitted to the FDA for expanded use in children at higher risk for severe RSV. The trial showed consistent safety with previous findings and supported the potential for Enflonsia to protect vulnerable children. Separately, GSK also presented new effectiveness data for its RSV vaccine, AREXVY, demonstrating significant vaccine effectiveness against RSV-related hospitalization.

feed.title: Owner of Detroit Free Press, USA TODAY Co., to acquire The Detroit News
feed.summary: USA TODAY Co., owner of the Detroit Free Press, announced its intention to acquire The Detroit News from MediaNews Group through a binding letter of intent. This acquisition aims to strengthen the USA TODAY Network's audience and reinforce its commitment to local journalism, with both the Detroit Free Press and The Detroit News continuing to publish separately. This development follows the recent dissolution of a long-standing joint operating agreement between the two Detroit newspapers.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Remains a Buy on Capital One Financial (COF)
